project.title: Neon Static
project.description: Synthetic test fixture: a fictional single with unconfirmed ownership, unconfirmed splits, and an uncleared sample.

rights.owner_claim: Rae Marlowe believes they own it, but a second collaborator (Kai) never signed a split sheet and may have a competing claim

provenance.creation_notes: Synthetic test fixture created for validate_transfer_package.py testing. Track includes a vocal chop from an unidentified source; second collaborator's involvement and split were never formally confirmed.

chain_of_custody.event: Source folder inventoried for Suede transfer package.

recommended_services.reason: Ownership, contributor, sample, and release facts need confirmation.
File hashes are present, but creation history and chain-of-custody need creator notes.
Primary audio was found and can be reviewed for final delivery quality.
No stems were detected; stems can improve licensing, remix, and derivative workflows.

optimization.notes: Synthetic fixture: rights review required before any further packaging.

missing_information.question: Who owns the master and publishing rights?
Who contributed to the work, what were their roles, and are splits confirmed?
Are all samples, loops, interpolations, or third-party beats cleared?
Has the work already been released, registered, minted, licensed, or sold?

risk_flags.label: ownership-unconfirmed
risk_flags.detail: Owner claim has not been confirmed by the creator.
risk_flags.recommended_action: Confirm master and publishing ownership before registry, licensing, or royalty routing.

risk_flags.label: contributors-unconfirmed
risk_flags.detail: Contributor list and splits are not confirmed.
risk_flags.recommended_action: Collect contributor roles and split confirmations.

risk_flags.label: sample-clearance-unconfirmed
risk_flags.detail: Samples or third-party material are indicated, but clearance is not confirmed.
risk_flags.recommended_action: Collect clearance records or remove uncleared material before licensing.

risk_flags.label: stems-not-found
risk_flags.recommended_action: Ask whether stems exist or use Suede stem preparation during optimization.
